perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman in a pink top sitting in front of two boxes of Korean fried chicken, one original and one glazed. Above her are icons of corn, noodles, yogurt, and a chicken leg. (2) She demonstrates various eating methods: first, she pulls a stretchy corn cheese mixture onto the chicken and eats it with an exaggerated expression of enjoyment. (3) Second, she eats spicy noodles alongside the chicken. (4) Third, she dips the chicken into a bowl of yogurt sauce. (5) Fourth, she wraps a piece of fried chicken in a large green lettuce leaf and takes a large bite. (6) Interspersed between these eating segments, she holds up a silver Taishin Bank credit card, pointing at it while various promotional screens showing discount percentages and partner brands (like CU, GS25, Olive Young) are overlaid on the screen. (7) The video concludes with her giving a thumbs-up and continuing to enjoy the food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic female vocals in Mandarin Chinese start immediately, accompanied by upbeat, high-tempo pop background music. (2) Loud, clear ASMR-style crunching and chewing sounds are prominently featured whenever the woman takes a bite. (3) Occasional 'ding' and sparkle sound effects occur simultaneously with the appearance of text overlays and brand logos. (4) The music maintains a consistent, energetic rhythm throughout the entire video, with the vocal delivery being fast-paced and persuasive during the credit card promotion segments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '韓國人教你 韓式炸雞道地吃法' (Koreans teach you authentic ways to eat Korean fried chicken) appearing as a main title. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '1.玉米起司 Corn Cheese', '2.火辣雞麵 Buldak noodles', '3.蜂蜜優格醬 Yogurt sauce', '5.包生菜吃' (Wrap in lettuce) used to categorize segments. (3) Functional/Promotion Text: '台新銀行太陽卡/玫瑰卡' (Taishin Bank Sun Card/Rose Card), '最高10%回饋' (Up to 10% cashback), and '24吋質感行李箱' (24-inch textured suitcase) highlighting card benefits and sign-up rewards.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Multi-method eating demonstration with integrated credit card promotion segments -> Final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing mukbang and product demonstration.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, red lipstick, and a pink cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primarily a clean, brightly lit indoor setting with food laid out on a table. Brief B-roll clips show the woman outside a 'bb.q CHICKEN' store and shopping app interfaces.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio lighting with high visibility.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between narration and ASMR highlights

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Method 1 -> Method 2 -> Card Promotion -> Method 3 -> Method 4 -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a highly integrated commercial advertisement. It uses the popular Mukbang format (eating Korean fried chicken) as a 'hook' to attract viewers' attention, then seamlessly pivots to promoting the Taishin Bank 'Sun' and 'Rose' credit cards by highlighting their cashback benefits at the very restaurants and stores being shown.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly holds the credit card, explains its specific cashback percentages (10% back), and mentions specific promotional periods and signup gifts (suitcase).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration mixed with professional ASMR eating segments.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets young consumers interested in Korean culture and food by linking those interests to a specific financial product (credit card rewards).
